name: Lunenburg Serenity Group
notes:
Group Contact:
Rob M 902-634-8542

**Hospital Regulations will apply as we are guests in the hospital, so this meeting may have other restrictions than you are used to**

Meetings are held in the Founder's Room [Main Floor] of the Fishermen's Memorial Hospital, 14 High Street

Masking is optional but is still required if visiting patients

The hospital has security at the main door and may ask you some questions as a pre-screening. You may bring your own mask. Masking is optional for now but is still required if visiting patients.

We hope to welcome back many members - some of whom we have not seen for 2-3 years now - and hope you will join us again as we rebuild our meeting at the Serenity Group in Lunenburg.
